title: BROTOU Drawing Sketching Pencils Set, 28 Packs Art Kit with Sketch Book Draw Pencils Dual Ended Colored Pencil Eraser Sharpener Pencil Case for Kids Adults and Art Beginners
features: 28PCS Sketching Drawing Pencil Set: BROTOU full sketch pencil set includes: 12 x drawing pencil, 12 x dual ended coloring pencil, 1 x sketchpad, 1 x pencil bag, 1 x eraser, 1 x sharpener

A Wide Variety of Sketching Pencils: This sketch pencil set includes a wide selection of pencils for the artwork needs, and from very soft to vey hard: 2H, H, F, HB, B, 2B, 3B, 4B, 5B, 6B, 7B, 8B. And the 12 coloured pencils are dual ended, which means you will own 24 colors to satisfy your coloring needs

Safe and Non-toxic: The Wood Pencils are made of environmentally friendly materials. They are acid-free and non-toxic with safely use with family and children. The pencil is completely glued to the wood and has a long service life
Broad Application: These art pencils are perfect for drawing, sketching and doodling. Our graphite pencil set is durable and long lasting, will help you enjoy the fun of painting
Ideal Present: The set of art pencils, includes pencil case eraser and pencil sharpener, is a perfect present for kids and adults who has an interest in the art of drawing
description: BROTOU Drawing Sketching Pencils Set, 28 Packs Art Kit with Sketch Book Draw Pencils Dual Ended Colored Pencil Eraser Sharpener Pencil Case for Kids Adults and Art Beginners
